benefits.description: Starting to appreciate the impact of GHK Cu after running since September 2025.

protocol_notes: Started GHK Cu in September 2025. Plans to run it continually. Takes zinc in the AM and GHK Cu at night. Notes the actual copper inclusion is nominal (0.157 mg per 1 mg GHK Cu in a standard 1:1 vial). Averaging ~2 mg about 5 days/week. Prefers to control own dosages rather than combined peptides; recommends TB500:BPC157 ratio of 2-4:1.
